summary: W1.3 copy overhaul + interactive WhatBreaksSection + Request Demo form validation testing on FieldAssure AI static marketing site. Verified: Hero badge/headline/subheadline/new supporting-line all exact match; Problem section heading/paragraph/7 questions (incl. 'What proof was submitted?' and '...or payment?') exact match; sitewide text search across Home + /product + /use-cases + /pricing + /about confirmed ZERO occurrences of 'site proof' and 'geography-aware'; Footer tagline updated correctly; FAQ Q3 rewritten correctly with 'global construction teams' + 'does not provide legal or compliance guarantees' wording. New WhatBreaksSection: desktop (1920px) renders 6 clickable tabs, clicking tab 2/4/5 correctly updates detail card content (problem+fix text) each time with amber active styling and smooth AnimatePresence crossfade, no layout break. Mobile (390px) renders 6 accordion items, expand/collapse works inline, zero horizontal overflow (scrollWidth==clientWidth). Request Demo form: (1) empty submit shows all 6 required-field errors and success message correctly hidden; (2) invalid email shows 'Enter a valid email address.' and blocks submission; (3) valid data with Message left blank submits successfully showing exact success text 'Thank you. Our team will contact you shortly.' with ZERO network calls to /api (confirmed via request listener - fully client-side). Regression: mobile hamburger Sheet menu opens correctly with all nav links; all 4 placeholder pages load without errors and without 'site proof' text.
critical_code_review_comments: WhatBreaksSection.jsx cleanly separates desktop tab+detail-card layout ('hidden md:grid') from mobile accordion ('md:hidden') - verified both render correctly with correct content mapping and no shared state bugs.

RequestDemoSection.jsx validateForm() correctly validates all 6 mandatory fields (name, company, email w/ regex, phone, role, projectSize) while message stays optional; success state only set when Object.keys(errors).length === 0 - verified via empty submit, invalid email, and full valid+blank-message submit paths, all with zero /api network calls confirmed via request listener.
All new data-testids (WHAT_BREAKS.*, DEMO_FORM.error*, HERO.supportingLine) match constants file exactly and are wired correctly in DOM.
Full text search (case-insensitive) across Home + 4 placeholder pages confirms zero remaining 'site proof' or 'geography-aware' copy - migration is complete and consistent.
No stock photos, fake dashboards, fake logos/testimonials, or compliance-guarantee claims found - Phosphor icons only, consistent with design constraints.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None needed - fully static, client-side only site
context_for_next_testing_agent: W1.3 copy + WhatBreaksSection + form validation iteration fully verified with zero bugs across desktop (1920px) and mobile (390px). All copy exact-match checks passed, sitewide 'site proof'/'geography-aware' removal confirmed, new interactive tabs/accordion section works flawlessly, and Request Demo form validation (mandatory fields, email regex, optional message, success path, zero network calls) all confirmed working correctly. Nothing outstanding to fix.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - no bugs found in this iteration
